priority_items: ri_1: Feasible schedule and constraint adherence unverifiable without schedule.csv and assertions.
ri_2: Economics and objective not auditable; cost_breakdown.csv missing; O2 take-or-pay exposure not reconciled.
ri_3: Reproducible notebook absent; offline execution not demonstrated.
ri_4: Utilization/power exports and figures missing.
ri_6: Option comparison lacks auditable exhibits and stranded-commit quantification.
ri_7: Incomplete assumptions and code-verified disclosures.

acceptance_checks: All artifacts exist under artifacts/ with exact filenames.
All assertions (power cap, lead times, J3 contiguity, split limits, objective reconciliation) pass.
Memo numbers match CSVs (spot-checked by deterministic cells).

planned_changes: Implement [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] with exact dependency pins, fixed seeds, no network, and one-click end-to-end generation of all artifacts.

Encode constraints and add assertion checks: 6h buckets; onsite power (owned+O3) <=640 kW per bucket; O1>=4h, O2>=24h, O3>=72h lead times; J3 contiguous >=384 GPUs; preemptible split_count<=3 with +2h overhead/split rounded to buckets; maintenance days 5-6 removes 64 owned GPUs; inference reservation preserved; network proxy via 8-GPU blocks within <=2 racks.
Export schedule to [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] with required fields and flags; validate schema in-notebook.
Compute and export [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] and [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] reconcile power curve to schedule and exclude O1/O2 from onsite power.

Implement full economics with reconciliation and export [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] include O2 used cost and 30-day 80% take-or-pay minimum (exposure), O3 setup fee once, energy costs for owned+O3 only, O4 penalties with correct tiers; assert sum(components)=objectives.
Generate [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] for all option sets and [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] for sensitivity (+25% GPU-hours/job).
Re-run optimization for the sensitivity case and export updated schedule/costs; compute and tabulate deltas vs. baseline.

Update capacity_board_memo.md to reference and reconcile to the generated CSVs/figures; include explicit disclosures for bucketization, rounding, network proxy, lead-time gating, maintenance, energy-cost scope, O2 stranded commitment, and limitations.
Add CI-like guard cells that fail execution if any file missing or any assertion fails; ensure paths under artifacts/ exactly match the contract.
